title: Castle Tour Script
text:
## Castle Tour Script

Welcome to the {adjective} Castle of {place}.

Please stay behind the {adjective} rope and do not touch the royal {object}.

**In the great hall:** Our guide will {verb} beside a portrait of {person}, who famously defeated a {adjective} {animal} with only a {body part}.

**In the dungeon:** Visitors may hear {plural noun} and one suspicious {sound}.

**Gift shop:** Buy a {color} crown, a {food}, or a postcard that says, "I survived the {adjective} stairs."
